title: erigeron acris subsp. staintonii
intro: Erigeron acris subsp. staintonii, also known as the Alpine Fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and inflammation. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations. Erigeron acris subsp. staintonii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
